label: Watches (SCAFFOLD — thin sources, uncalibrated; provisional/flagged only until Tier-1 + calibration land)

captureSlots.label: Dial (front)
captureSlots.guidance: Full dial, square-on, even light, no reflections.

captureSlots.label: Caseback
captureSlots.guidance: Caseback engravings and hallmarks, raked light.

captureSlots.label: Serial / reference macro
captureSlots.guidance: Macro of the serial and reference numbers (between lugs or caseback).

captureSlots.label: Movement
captureSlots.guidance: Movement with the caseback removed, if safely possible.

captureSlots.label: Papers / warranty card
captureSlots.guidance: Warranty card, chronometer certificate, service papers.

redFlags.label: Redial
redFlags.description: Refinished or reprinted dial presented as original.

redFlags.label: Frankenwatch
redFlags.description: Mismatched case, dial, and movement assembled from different watches.

redFlags.label: Altered serial
redFlags.description: Re-stamped or erased serial / reference numbers.

redFlags.label: Non-genuine movement
redFlags.description: Cloned or substituted movement inconsistent with the claimed calibre.

redFlags.label: Over-polished case
redFlags.description: Lost lug definition and soft hallmarks from aggressive polishing.

corpusSources.name: Brand archive extracts (e.g. Omega certificate service)
